ValidationRule.description: Locks core fields once Active. Drafts remain editable; the Draft->Active transition is allowed (PRIORVALUE). Bypass via Bypass_Promo_Code_Lock custom permission for rare Active edits.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), NOT($Permission.Bypass_Promo_Code_Lock), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Active"), OR( ISCHANGED(Code__c), ISCHANGED(CurrencyIsoCode), ISCHANGED(Discount_Type__c), ISCHANGED(Discount_Value__c), ISCHANGED(Total_Usage_Limit__c), ISCHANGED(Per_Member_Usage_Limit__c), ISCHANGED(Member_Type_Scope__c), ISCHANGED(Region_Scope__c), ISCHANGED(Application_Level__c), ISCHANGED(Product_Scope_Type__c), ISCHANGED(Product_Family_Scope__c), ISCHANGED(Specific_Products__c), ISCHANGED(Account__c), ISCHANGED(Combinable__c), ISCHANGED(Combination_Group__c), ISCHANGED(Display_Name__c), ISCHANGED(Terms__c), ISCHANGED(Approval_Required__c), ISCHANGED(Applicable_To__c), ISCHANGED(Min_Months_Since_Last_Active__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This field is locked once the promo code is Active. Allowed updates: Status and Effective dates. To make a correction, an admin must grant the Bypass Promo Code Lock permission.
